question: My order is delayed. What should I do?
answer: We apologize for the delay! Orders can sometimes take longer due to high demand or traffic. You can track your order live in the app. If the delay exceeds 20 minutes beyond the estimated time, please contact our support team.

question: How do I cancel my order?
answer: You can cancel your order within 2 minutes of placing it by going to 'My Orders' and tapping 'Cancel Order'. After 2 minutes, cancellation may not be possible as the restaurant may have started preparing your food.

question: I received the wrong order. What do I do?
answer: We're sorry about that! Please report the issue within 24 hours via 'Help' on your order page. Our team will review and issue a full refund or arrange a re-delivery.

question: The food quality was not good. Can I get a refund?
answer: We take food quality seriously. Please report the issue with a photo via the app within 24 hours. Our team will investigate and offer a refund or QuickBite credits depending on the case.

question: How do I track my order?
answer: Go to 'My Orders' in the app and tap on your active order. You'll see a live map with your delivery partner's location and an estimated arrival time.

question: My payment was deducted but the order was not placed.
answer: Don't worry! If payment was deducted but no order was confirmed, the amount will be automatically refunded to your original payment method within 5–7 business days.

question: How do I apply a coupon or promo code?
answer: On the checkout page, look for the 'Apply Coupon' field and enter your code. The discount will be applied automatically if the code is valid and applicable to your order.

question: Why is my coupon not working?
answer: Coupons may not work if they have expired, do not meet the minimum order value, or are restricted to specific restaurants or payment methods. Check the coupon's terms and try again.

question: Can I change my delivery address after placing an order?
answer: Address changes after order placement are not guaranteed. Please contact support immediately via chat. If the order is still being prepared, we'll try our best to update it.

question: How long does a refund take?
answer: Refunds to your original payment method take 5–7 business days. Refunds to QuickBite wallet credits are usually instant.

question: How do I contact the delivery partner?
answer: Once your order is picked up, you'll see a 'Call' button on your tracking screen to reach your delivery partner directly.

question: What do I do if my delivery partner is not reachable?
answer: If you're unable to reach your delivery partner, please contact QuickBite support via the Help section. We'll coordinate on your behalf.

question: The delivery partner took the wrong route. What should I do?
answer: You can monitor the route live on the tracking screen. If something seems unusual, contact support via the app immediately.

question: I did not receive my complete order. Some items are missing.
answer: Sorry about the missing items! Report this within 24 hours through 'Help' on your order page with a photo. We will refund the missing items to your QuickBite wallet.

question: Can I schedule an order for later?
answer: Yes! On the checkout page, tap 'Schedule Order' and select your preferred date and time. Scheduled orders are available up to 48 hours in advance.

question: How do I add special instructions for my order?
answer: On the item page or cart, you'll find a 'Special Instructions' text box. Type your request (e.g., no onions, extra spicy) and the restaurant will do their best to accommodate.

question: What payment methods are accepted?
answer: QuickBite accepts UPI, credit/debit cards, net banking, and QuickBite wallet credits. Cash on delivery is available in select areas.

question: Is cash on delivery available?
answer: Cash on delivery is available in select cities and for orders below ₹1,500. You'll see the COD option at checkout if it's available in your area.

question: How do I reorder my previous order?
answer: Go to 'My Orders', find the past order, and tap 'Reorder'. All items will be added to your cart automatically.

question: Why was my order automatically cancelled?
answer: Orders may be auto-cancelled if no delivery partner is available, the restaurant is unresponsive, or there was a payment failure. A full refund will be issued automatically.

question: How do I delete my QuickBite account?
answer: Go to Profile > Settings > Delete Account. Note that account deletion is permanent and all your order history and credits will be lost. Contact support if you need help.

question: The restaurant I want is showing as closed. Why?
answer: Restaurants set their own hours on QuickBite. If a restaurant appears closed, they may be outside their operating hours or temporarily unavailable. Try again later or choose a different restaurant.

question: Can I rate my delivery partner?
answer: Yes! After delivery, you'll be prompted to rate your delivery partner and leave feedback. Your ratings help us maintain service quality.

question: How do I update my phone number on QuickBite?
answer: Go to Profile > Edit Profile > Change Phone Number. You'll receive an OTP on your new number to verify the change.

question: Why is the delivery fee so high?
answer: Delivery fees depend on your distance from the restaurant, current demand, and weather conditions. During peak hours or rain, surge pricing may apply.

question: Does QuickBite offer a subscription or membership plan?
answer: Yes! QuickBite Pro gives you free delivery on eligible orders, exclusive discounts, and early access to offers. You can subscribe monthly or annually from the app.

question: What is QuickBite wallet and how do I use it?
answer: QuickBite wallet is a built-in digital wallet where refunds and credits are stored. You can use it to pay for future orders at checkout by selecting 'QuickBite Wallet' as your payment method.

question: My order was marked as delivered but I didn't receive it.
answer: Please report this immediately through 'Help' on the order page. We'll investigate with the delivery partner and if confirmed, issue a full refund within 24 hours.

question: How do I get a GST invoice for my order?
answer: Go to 'My Orders' > Select the order > Tap 'Download Invoice'. If you need a GST invoice with your company details, add your GSTIN in Profile > Billing Details before placing the order.

question: How do I refer a friend on QuickBite?
answer: Go to Profile > Refer & Earn. Share your unique referral code with friends. When they place their first order using your code, both of you receive QuickBite wallet credits.
